C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\05_States.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\05_States.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\05_States.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -std=c++0x -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\05_States.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o 05_States.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib05_States.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\05_States.dir\linkLibs.rsp
